news.paragraph: Market participants should prepare for potential volatility in IWM as the upcoming consumer inflation report serves as a key imminent catalyst. Recent trading sessions have shown mixed results for exchange-traded funds, influenced by both geopolitical developments and shifting equity futures. Traders should weigh these macroeconomic and political uncertainties before entering new positions.
